description: Basic serial test: two independent trivial stories

userStories.title: Add Multiply function
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a Multiply function in math.go
acceptanceCriteria: Add a Multiply(a, b int) int function to math.go that returns a * b
Add a doc comment for the function

userStories.title: Add math tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need tests for all math functions
acceptanceCriteria: Create math_test.go with tests for Add, Subtract, and Multiply
Each function has at least 2 test cases
